promotion_guardrail: Proposal-side only. Do not treat this closure audit as active A2 control memory or as proof that the archive lane is globally complete; it is only a bounded routing surface for the next archive re-entry choice.

selection_basis.queue_reason: Selected because the archive-root packaged batch sequence is now complete through batch10, so the next step must be a residual audit rather than a fictional folder-order package.
selection_basis.parent_reason: The completed batch08-batch10 children provide the current closure anchors for the archive terminal segment and prove that the late archive family is direct-child closed.
selection_basis.comparison_anchor_reason: Batch01-batch03 were checked as the remaining early archive parents without A2-mid children, while the apple, holodeck, and grok sibling reductions were used to measure how much direct-source coverage already exists before selecting the next archive parent.

deferred_alternatives.reason: Deferred because its direct-source family is already heavily covered and closure-audited in the refined-fuel nonsims lane, making its marginal archive re-entry value lower than batch03.
Deferred because its apple/axis direct-source sibling already has a narrower A2-mid reduction, while batch03 still offers a stronger mixed-parent unresolved seam with two useful sibling anchors.
Deferred because the folder-order package campaign is exhausted and cannot supply the next target.

raw_source_reread_reason: The needed work here was lane-state audit and next-parent nomination, not raw-source recovery. The ledger, remaining archive parent summaries, and existing sibling reductions were sufficient to determine the next bounded target.

candidate_items.name: ARCHIVE_PACKAGED_SEQUENCE_IS_NOW_FOLDER_ORDER_CLOSED
candidate_items.why_candidate: Preserves the key routing fact that archive batches 01 through 10 have all been first-pass processed and no further folder-order package remains.

candidate_items.name: LATE_ARCHIVE_SEGMENT_BATCH04_TO_BATCH10_IS_DIRECT_CHILD_CLOSED
candidate_items.why_candidate: Preserves the closure fact that the late archive family now has direct A2-mid children and should not be reopened by default.

candidate_items.name: REMAINING_UNCHILDED_ARCHIVE_PARENTS_ARE_BATCH01_BATCH02_BATCH03_ONLY
candidate_items.why_candidate: Preserves the reduced gap set after late-lane closure and prevents further routing drift.

candidate_items.name: BATCH01_IS_LOWER_PRIORITY_BECAUSE_DIRECT_SOURCE_REFINEDFUEL_COVERAGE_IS_ALREADY_CLOSED
candidate_items.why_candidate: Preserves the routing discipline that a giant archive constraint carrier should not outrank an unresolved mixed archive parent when the direct refined-fuel root is already coverage-closed.

candidate_items.name: BATCH03_IS_THE_NEXT_REAL_UNRESOLVED_ARCHIVE_PARENT
candidate_items.why_candidate: Preserves the strongest next re-entry target after closure: the mixed Holodeck/Grok archive parent remains unchilded while both of its main source-side lanes already have usable sibling reductions.

candidate_items.name: LEDGER_STATE_OVERRIDES_STALE_FOLDER_ORDER_ASSUMPTION
candidate_items.why_candidate: Preserves the process rule that selection must come from current ledger state rather than stale queue language or imagined remaining packages.

quarantined_items.name: SEARCHING_FOR_ANOTHER_FOLDER_ORDER_ARCHIVE_PACKAGE
quarantined_items.why_quarantined: The packaged archive sequence is exhausted at batch10, so no further folder-order package remains.

quarantined_items.name: REOPENING_BATCH04_TO_BATCH10_BY_DEFAULT
quarantined_items.why_quarantined: Those archive parents now have direct A2-mid children and are no longer the strongest unresolved targets.

quarantined_items.name: TREATING_BATCH10_TERMINAL_CLOSURE_AS_GLOBAL_ARCHIVE_COMPLETION
quarantined_items.why_quarantined: The folder-order package campaign is complete, but unresolved early archive parents still remain for selective re-entry.

quarantined_items.name: EARLIEST_ARCHIVE_PARENT_AS_AUTOMATIC_NEXT_TARGET
quarantined_items.why_quarantined: Batch01 is earlier in order, but its underlying refined-fuel source family is already direct-source closed enough that its marginal archive re-entry value is lower than batch03.

quarantined_items.name: CLOSURE_AUDIT_AS_ACTIVE_A2_CONTROL_UPDATE
quarantined_items.why_quarantined: This batch is only a bounded routing surface under A2-mid and must not be treated as direct active control memory.

reasons_for_candidate_status: These candidates isolate the lane-state facts that matter now: the packaged archive sequence is folder-order closed, the late archive segment is direct-child closed, the remaining unresolved parents are batch01-batch03, and batch03 is the strongest next bounded target after sibling-coverage accounting.
They remain routing-only, contradiction-preserving, and explicitly below active A2 authority.
reasons_for_quarantine_status: These items remain stale-queue overread, already-closed-parent reopening, global-completion overread, naive earliest-parent selection, or active-control promotion rather than clean routing packets.
The audit is useful for selection, but not promotable as active law.
